meta.title: Litro — Save on every fill-up and parking spot
meta.description: Real-time fuel prices, parking, route planning and smart alerts. All of Europe in one app.

banner.title: Litro
banner.tagline: Your AI copilot for savings on every fill-up

stats.title: The data that backs us.
stats.subtitle: Coverage across 3 continents, official data, and a market reach of hundreds of millions of drivers.
stats.whyTitle: Why do we update 4 times a day?
stats.whyBody: Official sources and aggregators publish prices in different windows: Spain and France in the morning (~06:00–12:00 CET), Italy twice (~08:00 and 14:00), Germany and Austria in real time, and community aggregators react throughout the day. To capture all changes without hammering the APIs, we run our pipeline 4 times daily and users always see the freshest prices possible.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use and protect your data in Litro App.
privacy.contactPrompt: Questions about your data? Write us at

s1.title: Data we collect
items: User account: email and password (or login token with Google/Apple). Optionally, your vehicle's license plate.
Location: device GPS coordinates, used exclusively to show you nearby gas stations and parking lots. We do not store your location history.
Favorites: the parking lots and gas stations you mark as favorites are saved against your account so they sync across sessions.
Payment data: parking reservation transactions are processed through Stripe. We do not store or have access to your credit or debit card data.

s2.title: How we use your data
items: Show you nearby gas stations and parking lots based on your location.
Save your preferences (default fuel, search radius, visual theme).

s3.title: Third-party services
s3.intro: The application uses the following external services:

s4.title: Storage and security
s4.body: Your data is stored on secure servers managed by Supabase with encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest. Passwords are stored using secure hashing and never in plain text. Session tokens are saved securely in the device's local storage.

s5.title: Data retention
s5.body: We keep your data while you maintain an active account in the app. You can request the complete deletion of your account and all associated data at any time by writing to the address shown below.

s6.title: Your rights
s6.intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable Spanish law, you have the right to:
items: Request the deletion of your data.
Object to the processing of your data.
Request the portability of your data.

s7.title: Minors' data
s7.body: Litro App is not directed at children under 16. We do not knowingly collect data from minors. If we discover that we have collected data from a minor, we will delete it immediately.

s8.title: Changes to this policy
s8.body: We may update this policy occasionally. We will notify you of any significant changes through the app or by email. The last updated date is shown at the top of this document.

europeHero.title: Helping you save on every km across Europe.
europeHero.subtitle: Daily-updated official fuel prices across the 23 countries we already cover. And more on the way.

worldHero.title: Helping you save on every km around the world.
worldHero.subtitle: Daily-updated official fuel prices across the countries we already cover. All of Europe, Latin America, Oceania and more on the way.

hero.title: Save on every litre.
hero.subtitle: Real-time fuel prices, available parking and smart route planning. All of Europe in your pocket.

features.sectionSubtitle: Seven features that change the way you drive.

parking.title: Park without circling.
parking.body: Real-time location of parking spots in every Spanish city. Reserve before you arrive.

prices.title: The cheapest prices, one tap away.
prices.body: Daily-updated price cards across 34 countries in Europe, the Americas and Oceania: from Portugal to Australia, including Germany, Mexico and Turkey.

alerts.title: Tell me when it drops.
alerts.body: Set alerts and we'll ping you the moment fuel hits the price you want. By station or by zone.

map.title: Everything near you.
map.body: Gas station and parking pins on a smooth map. Filter by brand, price or availability.

routes.title: We pick the cheapest stops for you.
routes.body: Plan routes with up to 6 stops at the cheapest stations along the way. Save up to 15% per trip.

favorites.title: Your spots, always at hand.
favorites.body: Save your favorite gas stations and parkings. Quick access and special notifications.

savings.title: See how much you've saved.
savings.body: A counter that tracks every euro you've saved with Litro. Because every fill-up matters.

contact.title: Reach millions of drivers across Europe.
contact.subtitle: Parking lots, garages, car washes, dealers or individuals: if your business wants visibility in front of a European audience of active drivers, let's talk.

about.title: One project, one person.
about.p1: Litro started as a personal project to solve a real problem: finding the cheapest petrol station without wasting time. Behind this app there's no company or team of 50 — just one independent developer with a strong drive to build something useful.
about.p2: All the development, design, servers, data collection across 34 countries and daily maintenance is handled by a single person. No investors, no ads, no selling your data.
about.donateTitle: Buy us a coffee (or a full tank)
about.donateBody: Keeping Litro running has real costs: servers, APIs, certificates... If you find the app useful and want to help out, any contribution helps us keep improving.
about.footer: Whether it's a coffee or a full tank, it's the gesture that counts

cta.title: Start saving today.
cta.subtitle: Litro is free. Download it and feel the difference on your next fill-up.
